text.title: Decision Rationale Capture — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the decision have long-term consequences (>3 months impact)?

conclusion.verdict: skip — overhead > value for short-term decisions
record decision with rationale + evidence + dissent

example.trace: DEC-15 → long-term → owner=Andriy → 3 alternatives → recorded with evidence
